# Merge PR #10 (run-9/red-baseline)

Tracking Issue for **PR #10** merge per **D-20260418-025** Option A.

**Branch**: `run-9/red-baseline`
**Scope**: Autonomous heartbeat bootstrap (Run 8) + dashboard red baseline (Run 9)
**PR status**: CONFLICTING (additive, UI-resolve)
**Click-through**: https://github.com/xXKillerNoobYT/Programming-lead-AI-System-/pull/10/conflicts
**Order**: 1 of 17

## How to merge

1. Open the click-through URL above
2. Click **Resolve conflicts**
3. Delete only the `<<<<<<<` / `=======` / `>>>>>>>` marker lines — keep the content on both sides (conflicts are additive)
4. Click **Mark as resolved** → **Commit merge**
5. Back on the PR: **Squash and merge** → **Delete branch**
6. Close this Issue (or let `closes #<this>` in the squash commit do it)

For MERGEABLE PRs (no conflict), skip step 3 — just **Squash and merge** directly.
